languages.text: "Абсурд! Невежество! Как смеешь ты намеренно искажать истину..." {n}Эоганн резко замолкает, обернувшись за плечо, словно прислушивается к кому-то. Обычно за этим плечом парит его дражайший коллега.{/n}

"Ridiculous! Ignorant fool! How dare you deliberately twist the truth—" {n}Eogunn stops talking abruptly, peering over his shoulder as if listening to someone — he is looking at the place where his dearest colleague usually hovers.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Абсурд! Невежество! Как смеешь ты намеренно искажать истину..." {n}Эоганн резко замолкает, обернувшись за плечо, словно прислушивается к кому-то. Обычно за этим плечом парит его дражайший коллега.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Ridiculous! Ignorant fool! How dare you deliberately twist the truth—" {n}Eogunn stops talking abruptly, peering over his shoulder as if listening to someone — he is looking at the place where his dearest colleague usually hovers.{/n}

"Ridiculous! Ignorant fool! How dare you deliberately twist the truth—" {n}Eogunn stops talking abruptly, peering over his shoulder as if listening to someone — he is looking at the place where his dearest colleague usually hovers.{/n}

"Ridiculous! Ignorant fool! How dare you deliberately twist the truth—" {n}Eogunn stops talking abruptly, peering over his shoulder as if listening to someone — he is looking at the place where his dearest colleague usually hovers.{/n}

languages.text: «¡Ridículo! ¡Necio ignorante! ¡Cómo se atreve a tergiversar la ver...». {n}Eogunn calla repentinamente y mira por encima del hombro como si escuchara a alguien. Mira al lugar donde suele flotar su querido colega.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Ridiculous! Ignorant fool! How dare you deliberately twist the truth—" {n}Eogunn stops talking abruptly, peering over his shoulder as if listening to someone — he is looking at the place where his dearest colleague usually hovers.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «¡Ridículo! ¡Necio ignorante! ¡Cómo se atreve a tergiversar la ver...». {n}Eogunn calla repentinamente y mira por encima del hombro como si escuchara a alguien. Mira al lugar donde suele flotar su querido colega.{/n}

languages.text: “荒谬！无知的蠢货！你怎么敢蓄意篡改事实——”{n}伊奥贡的话戛然而止，看向肩膀上方，像是在听谁说话——那是他最亲爱的同僚通常悬停的地方。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Ridiculous! Ignorant fool! How dare you deliberately twist the truth—" {n}Eogunn stops talking abruptly, peering over his shoulder as if listening to someone — he is looking at the place where his dearest colleague usually hovers.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “荒谬！无知的蠢货！你怎么敢蓄意篡改事实——”{n}伊奥贡的话戛然而止，看向肩膀上方，像是在听谁说话——那是他最亲爱的同僚通常悬停的地方。{/n}

languages.text: « C'est ridicule ! Vous êtes un imbécile doublé d'un ignorant ! Comment osez-vous délibérément déformer la vérité... » {n}Eogunn s'interrompt brusquement et tourne la tête, comme s'il écoutait quelqu'un. Il regarde par-dessus son épaule, à l'endroit où son cher collègue flotte habituellement.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Ridiculous! Ignorant fool! How dare you deliberately twist the truth—" {n}Eogunn stops talking abruptly, peering over his shoulder as if listening to someone — he is looking at the place where his dearest colleague usually hovers.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « C'est ridicule ! Vous êtes un imbécile doublé d'un ignorant ! Comment osez-vous délibérément déformer la vérité... » {n}Eogunn s'interrompt brusquement et tourne la tête, comme s'il écoutait quelqu'un. Il regarde par-dessus son épaule, à l'endroit où son cher collègue flotte habituellement.{/n}

languages.text: "Gülünç! Seni cahil! Gerçeği kasıtlı olarak çarpıtmaya nasıl cüret edersin..." {n}Eogunn, aniden konuşmayı kesiyor ve sanki birini dinliyormuş gibi omzunun üzerinden bakıyor. Pek değerli meslektaşının genellikle havada süzüldüğü yere bakıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Ridiculous! Ignorant fool! How dare you deliberately twist the truth—" {n}Eogunn stops talking abruptly, peering over his shoulder as if listening to someone — he is looking at the place where his dearest colleague usually hovers.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Gülünç! Seni cahil! Gerçeği kasıtlı olarak çarpıtmaya nasıl cüret edersin..." {n}Eogunn, aniden konuşmayı kesiyor ve sanki birini dinliyormuş gibi omzunun üzerinden bakıyor. Pek değerli meslektaşının genellikle havada süzüldüğü yere bakıyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Lächerlich! Ignoranter Idiot! Wie könnt Ihr es wagen, wissentlich die Wahrheit zu verdrehen ..." {n}Eogunn bricht ab und sieht über seine Schulter, als würde er jemandem zuhören ... sein Blick ruht auf der Stelle, an der sein geschätzter Kollege für gewöhnlich schwebt.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Ridiculous! Ignorant fool! How dare you deliberately twist the truth—" {n}Eogunn stops talking abruptly, peering over his shoulder as if listening to someone — he is looking at the place where his dearest colleague usually hovers.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Lächerlich! Ignoranter Idiot! Wie könnt Ihr es wagen, wissentlich die Wahrheit zu verdrehen ..." {n}Eogunn bricht ab und sieht über seine Schulter, als würde er jemandem zuhören ... sein Blick ruht auf der Stelle, an der sein geschätzter Kollege für gewöhnlich schwebt.{/n}

languages.text: 「バカバカしい！無知な愚か者め！よくもまあ、わざと真実を捻じ曲げて......」{n}エオグンは突然言葉を止め、誰かの話を聞くように肩越しに覗き込んだ。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Ridiculous! Ignorant fool! How dare you deliberately twist the truth—" {n}Eogunn stops talking abruptly, peering over his shoulder as if listening to someone — he is looking at the place where his dearest colleague usually hovers.{/n}
